ast: max(1)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                          |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                   |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt8([1]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: max(NULL)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | Null { len: 1 }             |
+--------+-----------------------------+

ast: max(x_null)
